subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have revealed the verses in the tongue of the people of Persia and sent them unto the Arabs, and have sent down the verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا انزلنا الایات بلسان اهل الفارس و ارسلناها الی الاعراب و انزلنا الایات
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @suffering and imprisonment
